tips_en: Start with SciReasoner (Paper 1)—it presents the broadest scientific impact with a unified structural-reasoning framework validated across 86 benchmarks in biology, chemistry, and materials science, making it a foundational contribution likely to influence multiple downstream fields. For robotics-focused researchers, read LaMem-VLA (Paper 2) and RynnWorld-Teleop (Paper 3) together, as they form a complementary pair: LaMem-VLA solves the long-horizon memory limitation in action policies, while RynnWorld-Teleop addresses the data-scarcity bottleneck by generating training trajectories from action-conditioned world models—both pushing toward more scalable, generalizable robotic manipulation.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 SciReasoner（论文1）——它在生物、化学和材料科学领域的 86 个基准测试中表现出色，提出了一种统一的结构推理框架，具有最广泛的科学影响力，可能影响多个下游领域。对于专注于机器人学的研究者，可以将 LaMem-VLA（论文2）和 RynnWorld-Teleop（论文3）放在一起阅读，因为它们构成互补的一对：LaMem-VLA 解决了动作策略中的长程记忆局限，而 RynnWorld-Teleop 通过动作条件世界模型生成训练轨迹，解决了数据稀缺瓶颈——两者共同推动更可扩展、更通用的机器人操控。
